{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"{"session_id":"","offset":400}","has_more":false,"total":5},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7604453702212797209","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"李正光写的确实好，人物刻画的深入，角色都是有血有肉的人物，细节描写到位，故事很真实，贴近现实，上班的路上边听边看很放松，难得好书！[笑]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770552250,"group_id":"7601557593378524185","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"原汁原味的文字，让人喜欢！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzfJGXgSHGQZ2u+qKONoJmzcqIPmlvNPNyVBqnw5Qz6U","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2e4305626cc8446cb23ff175725db5ee~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776618041&x-signature=N9ujJZ2%2F3tzYkTTKAuu5xA6SCK0%3D","user_id":"1925959379598813","user_name":"大秦赋"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1925959379598813","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_3","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.3","title_id":"author_level_3"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.3","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家Lv.3"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7601557593378524185","book_info":{"abstract":"他是乔四手下最牛的分舵主，继承乔四的衣钵，东三省的一把的大哥，自从乔四落网，他带着兄弟们勇闯京城，让麦当娜歌厅一跃成为京城招牌，敢打敢拼，被尊称为：“京城夜霸。”
“从今天开始，只要有我李正光一天，这京城的晚上就由我说了算！”李正光被众人前呼后拥，威风凛凛地站在高台上，扯着嗓子大声呼喊。瞧瞧这阵仗，谁能想到，眼前这个已然成为夜店世界统治者的男人。
